verification.runner: isolated Node runtime using byte-identical source logic
assertions: handoff names the correct GitHub environment and Pages project
handoff exposes required secret names but no values

privacy_boundary: No credential values, token prefixes, account identifier values, authorization headers, private chat, or health material are recorded.
limits: No resolving Cloudflare URL was established.
No served commit identity was verified.
The readiness workflow publishes an operator handoff; it does not deploy.
falsification_route: Run the committed tests, inspect the generated handoff artifact, and reject this evidence if it contains credential values or names a different environment/project.
